title: carya ovalis f. nuttallii
intro: Carya ovalis f. nuttallii, also known as the black walnut, is a deciduous tree native to North America, characterized by its dark brown or almost black bark and edible nuts. The medicinal properties of Carya ovalis f. nuttallii include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral compounds, which are found in its hulls and leaves. The health benefits of using Carya ovalis f. nuttallii include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and combat fungal infections. Carya ovalis f. nuttallii is often prepared as an herbal supplement, tea, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application for skin issues and wounds.
